name: Cheesy Cioppino
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Sweet (Mild) Italian Sausage - Thinly Sliced
1 medium Green Bell Pepper, Coarsely Chopped
1 lb Medium Shrimp, Deveined and Peeled
2 medium Lobster Tails, Cooked and Cut into 1/2-Inch Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, brown the sausage in the oil over medium heat.
2. Add the onion, green bell pepper, and garlic. Cook and stir until the onion is transparent.
3. Add the beef broth (32 oz + 2 cups), tomatoes with juice, tomato sauce, wine, shrimp, zucchini, carrots, and celery. Stir to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat. Reduce the heat if necessary so it doesn't boil or bubble aggressively.
5. Cook until the vegetables are tender and the shrimp is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
6. Add the lobster tails, pasta, parsley, basil, and cheese. Stir to combine.
7. Heat the mixture until it is warmed through but not boiling.
8. Spoon the soup into 8 individual ovenproof crocks or bowls.
9. Evenly top each serving with shredded Jarlsberg cheese.
10. Broil in an oven set to broil mode at a distance of 4 to 5 inches from the heat source until the cheese is melted and lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
